work_history.title: Associate Webmaster
work_history.summary: Maintained and updated the IEEE Kerala Section Website using WordPress, ensuring regular content accuracy and platform stability. Enhanced UI/UX and improved accessibility to ensure a user-friendly and inclusive experience across all devices.

work_history.title: Front-End Development Intern
work_history.summary: Developed and implemented responsive frontend components for Riglabs Collective, a hybrid skill development platform catering to students, professionals, corporates, institutes, mentors, and admins. Built and published a private NPM package with reusable UI components to maintain design consistency and accelerate future development cycles. Designed custom, elaborate theming using Tailwind CSS, ensuring brand consistency and a modern visual identity across the platform.

work_history.company: IEEE Student Branch College of Engineering Chengannur
work_history.title: Web Volunteer
work_history.summary: Built and developed the website of Navira - A flagship event conducted by IEEE SB CEC - Navira Website Developed website for Arcane - Tri Venue Hackathon conducted by IEEE SB CEC - Arcane Website

work_history.company: IEEE Student Branch College of Engineering Chengannur
work_history.title: Chairperson
work_history.summary: Shifted from hands-on leadership to a mentorship-driven approach, guiding junior executives to take ownership of events like Arcane, and helping them grow into confident organizers. Launched Incrypt, India’s largest blockchain-powered hackathon, while supporting the team behind Arcane, reflecting a focus on both innovation and empowering others to lead.

work_history.title: Campus Leader
work_history.summary: Built a growing community of Notion users on campus, conducting hands-on workshops and peer sessions to help students streamline their academic and personal productivity. Collaborated with Notion’s global team to bring exclusive resources and opportunities to students, while tailoring content and events to local needs and student workflows.
